notice: Community module index. Modules marked bundled:true ship with the app. External modules marked _status:coming-soon are planned but not yet hosted.

modules.name: Strong's Hebrew Concordance
modules.author: James Strong (1890) · OpenScriptures
modules.description: Full Hebrew lexicon — all 8,674 OT headwords with Hebrew script, transliteration, definition, and KJV usage.

modules.name: Strong's Greek Concordance
modules.author: James Strong (1890) · OpenScriptures
modules.description: Full Greek lexicon — all 5,624 NT headwords with Greek script, transliteration, definition, and KJV usage.

modules.name: Treasury of Scripture Knowledge
modules.author: R. A. Torrey (1836) · public domain
modules.description: Full Treasury of Scripture Knowledge — 432,898 cross-references covering 29,364 verses across all 66 books.

modules.name: Easton's + Smith's Bible Dictionary
modules.author: M. G. Easton (1893) + William Smith (1863)
modules.description: 5,965 entries from Easton's and Smith's Bible Dictionaries — every named person, place, and concept in scripture with 34,637 cross-references.

modules.name: Biblical Timeline
modules.author: CODEX
modules.description: 500+ events from Creation through Revelation with date ranges, scripture references, and descriptions.

modules.name: Torah Portions (Parsha)
modules.author: CODEX
modules.description: All 54 weekly Torah portions with start/end refs, haftarah readings, and maftir.

modules.name: Hebrew Calendar
modules.author: CODEX
modules.description: Hebrew calendar integration — holidays, fasts, special readings mapped to Gregorian dates.

modules.name: Kabbalistic Mappings
modules.author: CODEX
modules.description: Tree of Life sephirot mappings, letter correspondences, and gematria reference tables.

modules.name: Synoptic Gospel Parallels
modules.author: CODEX
modules.description: Side-by-side parallel passage mappings across Matthew, Mark, and Luke with color-coded shared/unique material.

modules.name: Curated Reels Deck
modules.author: CODEX
modules.description: 200+ hand-authored scripture cards — symbol cards, names of God, did-you-knows, prophecy pairings, and more.

modules.name: Prayer Formats
modules.author: CODEX
modules.description: Structured prayer templates across traditions — Christian, Jewish, contemplative, liturgical.

modules.name: Canonical Reading Plan (1 Year)
modules.author: CODEX
modules.description: Read the entire Bible in canonical order over one year — Genesis to Revelation.

modules.name: Chronological Reading Plan (1 Year)
modules.author: CODEX
modules.description: Read the Bible in approximate historical order over one year.

modules.name: Gospels in 90 Days
modules.author: CODEX
modules.description: Read all four Gospels in 90 days with daily portions.

modules.name: Psalms in 30 Days
modules.author: CODEX
modules.description: Read all 150 Psalms in one month — 5 per day.

modules.name: Whole Bible in 90 Days
modules.author: CODEX
modules.description: Intensive 90-day cover-to-cover plan — about 12 chapters a day.

modules.name: Daf Yomi
modules.author: Community
modules.description: Complete Daf Yomi cycle — 2,711 days across 37 tractates of the Babylonian Talmud (~7.5 years).

modules.name: Torah Triennial Cycle
modules.author: Community
modules.description: Complete triennial Torah cycle — all 54 parshiyot across 3 years (162 weekly readings).

modules.name: KJV Word Alignment (Sample)
modules.author: OpenScriptures
modules.description: Word-level Hebrew/Greek-to-English alignment for select KJV chapters. Powers interlinear mode on supported passages.

modules.name: Jamieson-Fausset-Brown Commentary
modules.author: Jamieson, Fausset & Brown (1871)
modules.description: Verse-by-verse critical and explanatory commentary on the whole Bible.

modules.name: Matthew Henry's Complete Commentary
modules.author: Matthew Henry (1710)
modules.description: The classic six-volume devotional commentary on the entire Bible.

modules.name: Nag Hammadi Library (English)
modules.author: Robinson translation
modules.description: 52 Coptic Gnostic tractates — Gospel of Thomas, Gospel of Philip, Apocryphon of John, and the rest.

modules.name: Dead Sea Scrolls (Highlights)
modules.author: Community · scholarly translations
modules.description: Curated highlights from Qumran — Community Rule, War Scroll, Habakkuk Pesher, Great Isaiah Scroll variants.
